name: anime-man
desc: Digital painting portrait of a 28-year-old Chinese man with short messy black hair, rectangular glasses, slightly tired but bright eyes, wearing a dark grey hoodie over a plain white t-shirt. Slim build, focused expression. 3D rendered illustration style, soft studio lighting, clean background. NOT a photograph. Anime-inspired semi-realistic digital art.

name: anime-woman
desc: Digital painting portrait of a 45-year-old Chinese woman with sharp short black bob haircut, confident expression, wearing a tailored navy blue blazer over white silk blouse. Lean face, high cheekbones, small silver stud earrings. 3D rendered illustration style, soft studio lighting, clean background. NOT a photograph. Anime-inspired semi-realistic digital art.

name: anime-cafe
desc: Digital painting of a modern minimalist coffee shop interior. Large window with afternoon sunlight. A corner table with a laptop, coffee cups. Industrial-chic decor: exposed brick, pendant lights. Warm golden light. Illustrated environment concept art style.
